{{Quote|They offer a token of their esteem.|[[Mayth Duvel]] presents the Nezriti Organization's Tumanian pressure-ruby to Prince Xizor|<ref name="SOTE" />}}
A '''Tumanian pressure-ruby''' was an extremely rare [[Gemstone/Legends|gemstone]], often [[Blood/Legends|bloodred]] in [[Color/Legends|color]],<ref name="CSWE" /> from the [[Tumani system/Legends|Tumani system]]<ref name="Fry-Atlas" /> in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Even a small example of a Tumanian pressure-[[Ruby/Legends|ruby]] could easily be worth several million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="CSWE" />

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]].</ref> shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]],<ref name="SOTE" /> the criminal group known as the [[Nezriti Organization]]<ref name="CSWE-Nezriti">{{CSWECite|II|377|Nezriti Organization}}</ref> petitioned for an alliance with the powerful [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate, [[Underlord|led]] by the [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Dark Prince|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]]. Hoping to gain Xizor's favor, the Nezriti sent the Black Sun leader a small package containing an oval-cut, and apparently flawless, bloodred Tumanian pressure-ruby. Inspecting the gem momentarily, Xizor casually tossed the gift onto his desk, not caring if it were to later fall in with the garbage, before declaring that he would consider the Nezriti Organization's proposal.<ref name="SOTE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Tumanian pressure-ruby appeared in the [[1996]] novel [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']], written by [[Steve Perry]].<ref name="SOTE" />
